source_pr.title: ddl: migrate test-infra to testify for rename tests
source_pr.body:
…egacy_rename_test

Problem Summary:

### What is changed and how it works?

### Check List

- [ ] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No code

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

root_cause_explanation: This PR migrates DDL rename-related tests from legacy gocheck-style suites to testify. Framework migration can reduce flaky suite lifecycle / fixture issues and is often used to bring back previously skipped unstable race tests.
fix_pattern: Migrate legacy gocheck-based DDL tests to testify (modern Go `testing.T` patterns), updating suite setup/teardown and assertions.
analysis:
PR title: ddl: migrate test-infra to testify for rename tests
PR url: https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/pull/32971
Triage sources: manual_triage, explicit_flaky_signal
Triage summary: c.Skip("skip race test")
Changed files (2): ddl/db_legacy_test.go, ddl/db_rename_test.go
Patch url: https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/pull/32971.patch
Picked test: type=unit path=ddl/db_legacy_rename_test.go name=db_legacy_rename_test
